<a id="class-audioeffectreverb"></a>

# AudioEffectReverb

**Inherits:** [AudioEffect](class_audioeffect.md#class-audioeffect) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Adds a reverberation audio effect to an Audio bus.

## Description

Simulates the sound of acoustic environments such as rooms, concert halls, caverns, or an open spaces.

## Tutorials

- [Audio buses](../tutorials/audio/audio_buses.md)
- [Third Person Shooter (TPS) Demo](https://godotengine.org/asset-library/asset/2710)

| [float](class_float.md#class-float)   | [hipass](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-hipass)                       | `0.0`   |
| [float](class_float.md#class-float)   | [predelay_feedback](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-predelay-feedback) | `0.4`   |
| [float](class_float.md#class-float)   | [predelay_msec](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-predelay-msec)         | `150.0` |

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-audioeffectreverb-property-damping"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **damping** = `0.5` [🔗](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-damping)

-  **set_damping**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_damping**()

Defines how reflective the imaginary room's walls are. Value can range from 0 to 1.

---

<a id="class-audioeffectreverb-property-dry"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **dry** = `1.0` [🔗](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-dry)

-  **set_dry**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_dry**()

Output percent of original sound. At 0, only modified sound is outputted. Value can range from 0 to 1.

---

<a id="class-audioeffectreverb-property-hipass"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **hipass** = `0.0` [🔗](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-hipass)

-  **set_hpf**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_hpf**()

High-pass filter passes signals with a frequency higher than a certain cutoff frequency and attenuates signals with frequencies lower than the cutoff frequency. Value can range from 0 to 1.

---

<a id="class-audioeffectreverb-property-predelay-feedback"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **predelay_feedback** = `0.4` [🔗](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-predelay-feedback)

-  **set_predelay_feedback**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_predelay_feedback**()

Output percent of predelay. Value can range from 0 to 1.

---

<a id="class-audioeffectreverb-property-predelay-msec"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **predelay_msec** = `150.0` [🔗](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-predelay-msec)

-  **set_predelay_msec**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_predelay_msec**()

Time between the original signal and the early reflections of the reverb signal, in milliseconds.

---

<a id="class-audioeffectreverb-property-room-size"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **room_size** = `0.8` [🔗](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-room-size)

-  **set_room_size**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_room_size**()

Dimensions of simulated room. Bigger means more echoes. Value can range from 0 to 1.

---

<a id="class-audioeffectreverb-property-spread"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **spread** = `1.0` [🔗](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-spread)

-  **set_spread**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_spread**()

Widens or narrows the stereo image of the reverb tail. 1 means fully widens. Value can range from 0 to 1.

---

<a id="class-audioeffectreverb-property-wet"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **wet** = `0.5` [🔗](#class-audioeffectreverb-property-wet)

-  **set_wet**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_wet**()

Output percent of modified sound. At 0, only original sound is outputted. Value can range from 0 to 1.
